title: Las Emociones
subtitle: Un viaje por el mundo de los sentimientos
learning_objectives: Comprender que todas las emociones son válidas

images.description: Book cover with diverse emoji faces showing different emotions
images.prompt: Colorful children's book illustration of five large emoji-style faces showing happiness, sadness, anger, fear, and love, arranged in a circle with bright gradient background, playful and warm style, vibrant colors, suitable for preschool age 2-5

images.description: Diverse group of happy children with expressive faces
images.prompt: Bright children's book illustration of a diverse group of 5 preschool children (ages 2-5) with different skin tones standing together in a colorful garden, each child showing different facial expressions and emotions, happy and welcoming scene, soft cartoon style, warm natural lighting

Cheerful children's book illustration of a young Hispanic girl with dark hair smiling widely while swinging on a playground swing, bright sunny day, birds singing around her, sparkles of joy floating in the air, warm colors, soft cartoon style perfect for preschool books

images.description: Sad boy being comforted by mom
images.prompt: Gentle children's book illustration of a young boy sitting on his bed hugging a teddy bear with a single tear on his cheek, his caring mother approaching with open arms to comfort him, soft bedroom lighting, warm and safe atmosphere, tender moment, suitable for preschool emotional learning

Expressive children's book illustration of a young girl with crossed arms and furrowed brow showing anger, her cheeks red, standing next to a fallen tower of colorful building blocks, indoor playroom setting, soft cartoon style that teaches emotion recognition for ages 2-5

images.description: Scared child during thunderstorm with protective father
images.prompt: Comforting children's book illustration of a small child peeking out from behind their protective father during a thunderstorm, lightning visible through window, father giving reassuring hug, warm indoor lighting contrasting with storm outside, safe and secure feeling, suitable for teaching about fear to preschoolers

Delightful children's book illustration of a young girl with wide-open eyes and mouth in 'O' shape showing surprise, receiving a beautifully wrapped present with large golden bow, sparkles and stars around her expressing amazement, warm bright colors, joyful cartoon style for preschool

Heartwarming children's book illustration of a diverse family in a group hug - mother, father, two young children, and a friendly dog - all smiling with floating hearts around them, warm golden lighting, expressions of love and affection, soft cartoon style perfect for teaching emotions to ages 2-5

images.description: Excited boy ready for first day of school
images.prompt: Energetic children's book illustration of an enthusiastic young boy jumping with arms raised high in excitement, wearing a new backpack, ready for his first day of school, sparkles and celebration confetti around him, bright morning light, joyful and dynamic cartoon style for preschoolers

images.description: Circle of diverse children sharing emotions
images.prompt: Inclusive children's book illustration of diverse preschool children sitting in a circle on the floor, each child showing a different emotion through facial expressions and gestures, sharing and communicating, warm classroom or home setting, soft natural light, teaching emotional awareness for ages 2-5

images.description: Child practicing emotion faces in mirror
images.prompt: Playful children's book illustration of a young child standing in front of a mirror making different facial expressions - happy, sad, angry, surprised - practicing recognizing emotions, bedroom setting with good lighting, educational and encouraging tone, soft cartoon style suitable for preschool emotional learning

discussion_questions: ¿Es bueno hablar sobre cómo nos sentimos?
¿Puedes hacer una cara feliz? ¿Y una cara triste?
notes: Social-emotional learning is critical for preschool development. This book introduces core emotions with validating language and teaches that all feelings are acceptable. Encourages emotional vocabulary and expression.
